title: Preconception counseling

investigations.text: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.
investigations.rationale: Supports entered reproductive, medical, medicine and partner history in a fertility context.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility

exact_section.heading: Chapter 3.1–3.3 — objective, indication, initial consultation, and medical history

assessment.text: Requires preference-sensitive discussion, psychosocial support, transparent information, and consent-based collaborative decisions.
assessment.rationale: Supports person-centred goals and shared discussion.
assessment.evidence_extract: Requires preference-sensitive discussion, psychosocial support, transparent information, and consent-based collaborative decisions.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility

exact_section.heading: Chapter 3.3 — diagnosis discussion, psychosocial support, and shared decisions

assessment.text: Requires understandable information, voluntary informed choice, client preference, consent, and freedom from coercion.
assessment.rationale: Supports voluntary reproductive choice where contraception discontinuation is relevant.
assessment.evidence_extract: Requires understandable information, voluntary informed choice, client preference, consent, and freedom from coercion.

source_limitations: Pregnancy intention, timeline, history, medicines, immunization, exposures, genetics and partner context are absent.
No test, supplement, medicine change, fertility diagnosis or referral is generated.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
